import sys

Bash("G:\\PycharmProjects\\FundManager-V2\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "
import sys
print\(''Python:'', sys.executable\)
print\(''Python Path:'', sys.path[:3]\)

try:
    import openai
    print\(''OpenAI version:'', openai.__version__\)
    from openai import OpenAI
    print\(''OpenAI class imported successfully''\)
    
    # 测试客户端初始化
    client = OpenAI\(
        api_key=''test'',
        base_url=''http://test''
    \)
    print\(''Client initialized:'', type\(client\)\)
except ImportError as e:
    print\(''ImportError:'', e\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(''Error:'', e\)
")

Bash("G:\\PycharmProjects\\FundManager-V2\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "
with open\(''pages/fund_detail.py'', ''r'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)
    checks = [
        \(''isinstance\(analysis_result, dict\)'', ''Type check added''\),
        \(''return_ability = analysis_result.get'', ''return_ability fix added''\),
        \(''stability_data = analysis_result.get'', ''stability fix added''\)
    ]
    for check, msg in checks:
        if check in content:
            print\(''[OK]'', msg\)
        else:
            print\(''[MISSING]'', msg\)
    print\(''Done!''\)
")
